name: Litian Pictures Holdings Limited
summary: Litian Pictures Holdings Limited operates as a drama series distribution company, providing drama series development, production, marketing, and distribution services in the People's Republic of China. It engages in licensing the broadcasting rights of self-produced and outright-purchased drama series; selling script copyrights of drama series; and acting as a distribution agent of the broadcasting rights of TV series. The company also acts as a non-executive producer and enter into co-financing arrangements with the executive producers of the drama series. Its principal customers include TV channels, including satellite and terrestrial TV channels, as well as online media platforms. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
